title.ko: 다중통신(디지털정보 전송에 대한 특유한 것 H04L 5/00; 하나 이상의 텔레비젼신호를 동시 또는 순차로 전송하기 위한 시스템 H04N 7/08; 교환기에 있어서의 것 H04Q 11/00)
title.en: MULTIPLEX COMMUNICATION (peculiar to transmission of digital information H04L0005000000;systems for the simultaneous or sequential transmission of more than one television signal H04N0007080000;in exchanges H04Q0011000000)

definition.ko: 이 서브클래스는 이하의 것을 포함한다. - 동일전송로상에 복수개의 신호를 동시적 또는 순차적으로 전송하는 목적으로 그들의 신호를 결합 또는 분리하기 위한 회로장치 - 그를 위한 감시배치를 다룬다

title.en: Frequency-division multiplex systems (H04J0014020000 takes precedence)
Details
Frequency-transposition arrangements
using digital techniques
Arrangements for supplying the carrier waves
Arrangements for combining channels
Intermediate station arrangements, e.g. for branching, for tapping-off
Arrangements for reducing cross-talk between channels
Arrangements providing for calling or supervisory signals
Monitoring arrangements
in which all the carriers are amplitude-modulated (H04J0001020000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 적어도 하나의 반송파가 각변조된 것(H04J 1/02이 우선)
title.en: in which at least one carrier is angle-modulated (H04J0001020000 takes precedence)
Time-division multiplex systems (H04J0014080000 takes precedence)
Details
Distributors combined with modulators or demodulators
Synchronising arrangements
using pulse stuffing for systems with different or fluctuating information rates
Intermediate station arrangements, e.g. for branching, for tapping-off
Arrangements for reducing cross-talk between channels
Arrangements providing for calling or supervisory signals
Monitoring arrangements

title.ko: 단일 전송 사이클 내의 개개의 채널에 대한 시간할당이 가변인 것, 예. 복수신호의 변화를 수용하기 위한 것, 전송채널의 수를 변화시키기 위한 것(H04J 3/17, H04J 3/24가 우선)
title.en: in which the time allocation to individual channels within a transmission cycle is variable, e.g. to accommodate varying complexity of signals, to vary number of channels transmitted (H04J0003170000, H04J0003240000 take precedence)
in which the transmission channel allotted to a first user may be taken away and re-allotted to a second user if the first user becomes inactive, e.g. TASI
using frequency compression and subsequent expansion of the individual signals
using resonant transfer
in which the sources have different rates or codes

title.ko: 할당이 어드레스에 의하여 지시되는 것(H04J 3/17이 우선)
title.en: in which the allocation is indicated by an address (H04J0003170000 takes precedence)
in which the information and the address are simultaneously transmitted

title.ko: 시분할 다중화 시스템과 주파수분할 다중화 시스템과의 조합(H04J 13/00이 우선)
title.en: Combined time-division and frequency-division multiplex systems (H04J0013000000 takes precedence)
Multiplex systems in which the amplitudes or durations of the signals in individual channels are characteristic of those channels
in which the polarity of the amplitude is characteristic
Multiplex systems in which each channel is represented by a different type of modulation of the carrier
Orthogonal multiplex systems (H04J0013000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 코드 분할 다중 시스템 (주파수 호핑을 위한 것 H04B 1/713)
title.en: Code division multiplex systems (for frequency hopping H04B0001713000)

definition.ko: 이 그룹을 분류할 때, 확산 스펙트럼 기술이 주파수 호핑에 특정되지 않고, 탐색에 대한 관심 정보를 표현하는 것으로 간주되는 것은, H04B 1/69 그룹으로도 분류될 수 있다.

title.en: Code generation
Generation of orthogonal codes
Generation of codes with a zero correlation zone
Code allocation
Allocation of orthogonal codes
having an orthogonal variable spreading factor [OVSF]
Allocation of codes with a zero correlation zone
Optical multiplex systems
Wavelength-division multiplex systems
Mode multiplex systems
Polarisation multiplex systems
Time-division multiplex systems
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
